headline: Is Gartner Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Gartner has underperformed the Nasdaq Composite over the past year. Moreover, Wall Street analysts remain tepid about its prospects.

raw.headline: Is Gartner Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
raw.summary: Gartner has underperformed the Nasdaq Composite over the past year. Moreover, Wall Street analysts remain tepid about its prospects.

headline: Gartner Marketing Survey Finds 84% of Companies Are Stuck in a "Brand Doom Loop"
summary: DENVER, June 10, 2026--Eighty-four percent of companies are stuck in a "brand doom loop" that prevents marketing leaders from proving brand’s impact on enterprise growth, according to a survey by Gartner, Inc., a business and technology insights company.

raw.headline: Gartner Marketing Survey Finds 84% of Companies Are Stuck in a "Brand Doom Loop"

headline: Cognizant Stock: Is CTSH Underperforming the Technology Sector?
summary: While Cognizant has underperformed the broader tech sector over the past year, analysts are fairly bullish about the stock’s prospects.
